    RustMinerSystem Core ServerRMS Secure ClientRustMinerSystem Mobile AppPoolNode App

PoolNode App

PoolNodeApp is the end-user mobile app for pool nodes built on RustMinerSystem, giving pool users a mobile entry for earnings, hashrate, workers, and asset records.

Read usage guideLatest Release Android v1.0.1 / iOS v1.0.1
PoolNode AppEnd-user app for pool nodes

Let pool users check node earnings, hashrate trends, worker status, and asset records in a familiar mining-pool app experience.

Mobile downloads

Choose the installer for your phone

Android users can download the APK directly. iOS users should install from the App Store with a Hong Kong or US Apple ID.

Android APK

Latest Release v1.0.1

Scan the QR code or use the button to download the APK. If Android blocks unknown sources, follow the system prompt to allow this installation.

Download Android APK

iOS App Store

Latest Release v1.0.1

Scan the QR code or use the button to open the App Store. The current iOS app requires a Hong Kong or US Apple ID.

Open App Store

Node earnings dashboard

Bring coin earnings, estimated fiat value, and pool-node data into one mobile view.

Workers and hashrate

Check 10-minute hashrate, 24-hour hashrate, online status, and rejection rate to spot abnormal workers.

Assets and records

Review income records, payout records, and payout address binding from the phone.

RustMinerSystem

RustMinerSystem is built for operators who need more than a pool proxy: route miners to third-party pools with explicit hashrate skimming rules, launch a real PoolNode with settlement-layer fees, and add RMS encrypted compression when bandwidth or public connections become the bottleneck.
